case_title: MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS VS. JOHN EVERETT COLLINS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED FEB-11-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED FEB-11-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2055 SACRAMENTO STREET, #808, AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, JOHN EVERETT
